title: 战略咨询智能支持 - 科技实体清单管理
prompt:
Title: 战略咨询智能支持 - 科技实体清单管理
Context: Internal system layout for a large-scale government/enterprise data platform (Strategic Consulting Intelligent Support).
Description of the screen: A professional Web PC (1440px) internal system dashboard layout. 
- Top Header: White background, 1px light gray bottom border. Left side shows 'GKX Logo' and '战略咨询智能支持'. Center has a capsule search bar. Right side has notification icons and user avatar.
- Left Sidebar: Dark gradient background (deep navy to teal) with a subtle glowing effect. Navigation structure:
  - Header: '战略咨询智能支持'
  - Menu Items: '研究需求分析' (Expanded), '技术体系分析', '技术趋势分析', '领域技术线路', '战略咨询报告', '战略咨询成果'.
  - Sub-menu (under 研究需求分析): '科技实体清单' (Active state with a bright cyan-blue glow and light text), '颠覆性与前沿技术分析', '媒体聚焦'.
- Right Content Area: Light gray background (#F5F7FA).
  - Breadcrumb: '战略咨询智能支持 / 研究需求分析 / 科技实体清单'.
  - Page Title: '科技实体清单'.
  - Filter Card: White card with large border-radius (12px), subtle shadow. Contains a capsule search box, dropdowns for '技术领域', '地区', '创新指数', '标签', and '查询'/'重置' buttons in lake blue.
  - Toolbar: '批量导入', '导出' buttons, and view switch icons (Grid/List).
  - Main Table Card: White card containing a clean data table. Columns: '名称', '领域', '创新指数', '标签', '更新时间', '操作' (View/Edit/Delete links in lake blue). Pagination at the bottom right.
- Style: Large border-radius, generous whitespace, lake blue/teal primary colors, professional Chinese copy.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
